case_title: HADI WIDJAJA VS. ELVIRA MONK et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,510.71 FILED BY WIDJAJA, HADI AS TO DEFENDANT MONK, ELVIRA MOORE, TYNA MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WIDJAJA, HADI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 - SERVED JAN-04-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MONK, ELVIRA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ELVIRA MONK. JOHN OEI INTERPRETS ENGLISH/INDONESIAN - INDONESIAN/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO TYNA MARIE MOORE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-30-2012 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WIDJAJA, HADI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONK, ELVIRA $1,143.58 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,323.58, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST TYNA MARIE MOORE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (NO PROOF OF SERVICE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MONK, ELVIRA
